category_sources: Official documentation at https://pygments.org/docs/ describes Pygments syntax highlighting components.
display_name_sources: Official site and GitHub repository use the name Pygments.
docs_sources: Official Pygments documentation page is https://pygments.org/docs/.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository states development takes place on GitHub.
Official Pygments download page references cloning https://github.com/pygments/pygments.
tags_sources: Official docs list lexers, formatters, styles, and CLI usage.
